[{"type":"text","text":"I'll check the current TV status and my available tools to give you an updated overview of what I can do for you right now.

"},{"type":"tool_use","id":"bbm7wr76","name":"bash","input":{"command":"tizen-context-cli context
CARBON_HOME="${CARBON_HOME:-/opt/usr/home/owner/.carbon}"
SKILL_ROOT="$CARBON_HOME/skills"
printf 'tools\n'
for tool in carbon-claw tizen-context-cli tizen-hud-cli tizen-viewer-launch-cli \
  tizen-search-content-cli tizen-tvplus-cli tizen-play-content-cli \
  tizen-aurum-cli tizen-app-cli agent-browser-cli
do
  path="$(command -v "$tool" 2>/dev/null || true)"
  if [ -n "$path" ]; then
    printf 'tool\t%s\tavailable\t%s\n' "$tool" "$path"
  else
    printf 'tool\t%s\tmissing\n' "$tool"
  fi
done

printf 'skills\n'
find "$SKILL_ROOT" -mindepth 2 -maxdepth 2 -name SKILL.md 2>/dev/null | sort |
while IFS= read -r file
do
  awk '
    BEGIN { in_fm = 0; name = ""; desc = "" }
    NR == 1 && $0 == "---" { in_fm = 1; next }
    in_fm && $0 == "---" { exit }
    in_fm && /^name:[[:space:]]*/ {
      sub(/^name:[[:space:]]*/, ""); gsub(/^"|"$/, ""); name = $0; next
    }
    in_fm && /^description:[[:space:]]*/ {
      sub(/^description:[[:space:]]*/, ""); gsub(/^"|"$/, ""); desc = $0; next
    }
    END { if (name != "") printf "skill\t%s\t%s\n", name, desc }
  ' "$file"
done"},"metadata":{"thoughtSignature":""}}]

skills
skill	agent-browser	Browser automation CLI for AI agents. Use when the user needs to interact with websites, including navigating pages, filling forms, clicking buttons, taking screenshots, extracting data, testing web apps, or automating any browser task. Triggers include requests to "open a website", "fill out a form", "click a button", "take a screenshot", "scrape data from a page", "test this web app", "login to a site", "automate browser actions", or any task requiring programmatic web interaction.
skill	capability-curation	'MUST use this skill for capability, help, and self-introduction requests instead of giving a generic self-introduction. Trigger when the user asks "너는 뭘 할 수 있냐?", "지금 할 수 있는 작업을 알려줘", "뭐 할 수 있어?", "기능 알려줘", "help", "what can you do?", or asks for current available actions, examples, or a capability menu. It combines current Tizen TV context, visible screen/content, installed Carbon skills, available CLIs, and general assistant capabilities, then answers in three blocks: current status, current-context actions with examples, and general capabilities with examples.'
skill	crossdevice-context	Retrieve personalized context and data from nearby devices (primarily mobile) via D2D communication. Use when the user requests personalized information based on preferences, habits, recent activities, or cross-device task continuity. Subcommand required (list-tools, nearby-devices, execute).
skill	tizen-a2ui-json-generator	Generate, repair, or validate A2UI v0.9 protocol JSON and Widgets. Trigger this skill whenever a user asks to "make a widget", "generate A2UI", or requests A2UI messages (createSurface, updateComponents, updateDataModel). Enforces strict A2UI v0.9 specifications and generates proper component payloads.
skill	tizen-application-management	Manages Tizen applications and packages including launch, terminate, list, install, and remove operations. Use when the user asks about running applications, wants to launch or terminate apps, or needs to install/remove packages.
skill	tizen-content	Search and play content on Samsung TV. Use when the user wants to find, search, recommend, or play movies, TV shows, Samsung TV Plus channels and YouTube videos. Orchestrates tizen-search-content-cli and tizen-play-content-cli.
skill	tizen-context	Queries app/broadcast/HUD context, captures or browses screenshots by time, and gets key event history from Tizen TV. Subcommand required (context, screenshot, keys). Use screenshot subcommand with --at for time-relative screenshots (e.g., --at 10s). Requires agent-context-service running on device.
skill	tizen-cross-device	Manages cross-device operations, multi-assistant framework, user activity recognition, and personalized context from nearby devices. Use when working with cross-device communication, multi-assistant coordination, user activity tracking, or retrieving personal data from connected mobile devices.
skill	tizen-hud	Controls the agent-hud-service overlay and recommendation UI on Tizen TV via AppControl. Use when you need to show/hide overlay text, content recommendations, query HUD state, or select content to launch on the TV screen.
skill	tizen-presentation-catalog	Use this skill when generating presentation JSON for the Samsung Tizen TV app. The LLM should output one semantic TV presentation JSON object. The app handles the final rendering internally.
skill	tizen-ui-navigation	Navigates Tizen TV apps via TV remote keys and accessibility tree. Use when the user wants to launch or install an app, switch category tabs (추천/라이브/Apps), tune a Samsung TV Plus channel, browse home-screen content rows, find an on-screen item, or otherwise operate the TV UI. Orchestrates tizen-aurum-cli (keys/clicks/dump-tree/find), tizen-context-cli (verify foreground app), and tizen-hud-cli (status overlay). Includes per-app guides for Samsung TV Home (CSFS), YouTube, and Samsung TV Plus.
skill	tizen-viewer-launcher	End-to-end TV surface orchestration for natural-language display requests. Use this skill whenever the user wants to show something on the TV screen — '날씨 보여줘', '뉴스 알려줘', '주식 확인', '출근길 띄워줘', '오늘 브리핑해줘', 'show me the weather', 'show my commute', or any request that implies preparing domain data and rendering it on a TV surface. This skill handles the presentation-first pipeline: scenario inference → structured source data → presentation JSON → save → runtime handoff.
","is_error":false}]

[{"type":"text","text":"**현재 상태**

지금은 유튜브 앱에서 '핑크퐁 아기상어 체조' 영상을 시청 중입니다. 방금 영상의 30초 앞으로 이동하는 조작을 도와드렸습니다.

**현재 상태 기반으로 할 수 있는 일**

- 현재 재생 중인 유튜브 영상 조작하기 (일시정지, 건너뛰기, 볼륨 조절 등)
- 화면에 나오는 캐릭터나 노래 제목에 대해 더 자세히 물어보기
- 비슷한 다른 핑크퐁 영상이나 아이들이 좋아할 만한 콘텐츠 더 찾기

예시: `영상 멈춰줘`, `아기상어 노래 가사 알려줘`, `다른 핑크퐁 노래 찾아줘`

**일반적으로 할 수 있는 일**

- 영화, 방송, YouTube 콘텐츠를 검색하고 바로 재생하기
- 날씨, 뉴스, 주식 등 실시간 정보를 요약해서 TV 카드로 보여주기
- TV의 앱 실행, 메뉴 이동 등 리모컨 조작 대신하기

예시: `뉴스 요약해줘`, `오늘 브리핑 TV에 보여줘`, `유튜브 열어줘`

"},{"type":"tool_use","id":"arfd1li4","name":"bash","input":{"command":"app_launcher -s org.tizen.agent-hud-service method RenderJson a2ui '[{"version":"v0.9","createSurface":{"surfaceId":"capability_menu_yt","catalogId":"https://a2ui.org/specification/v0_9/basic_catalog.json","theme":{"primaryColor":"#ff0000","agentDisplayName":"도움말"}}}, {"version":"v0.9","updateComponents":{"surfaceId":"capability_menu_yt","components":[{"id":"root","component":"Card","child":"container"},{"id":"container","component":"Column","children":["header","status_section","actions_section"],"gap":"medium"},{"id":"header","component":"Text","text":"유튜브 시청 중 도움말","variant":"h2"},{"id":"status_section","component":"Column","children":["status_title","status_text"],"gap":"small"},{"id":"status_title","component":"Text","text":"현재 상태","variant":"h3"},{"id":"status_text","component":"Text","text":"유튜브: 핑크퐁 아기상어 체조 재생 중","variant":"body"},{"id":"actions_section","component":"Column","children":["actions_title","action1","action2","action3"],"gap":"small"},{"id":"actions_title","component":"Text","text":"추천 작업","variant":"h3"},{"id":"action1","component":"Text","text":"• 영상 조작 (일시정지, 건너뛰기)","variant":"body"},{"id":"action2","component":"Text","text":"• 관련 영상 찾기","variant":"body"},{"id":"action3","component":"Text","text":"• 정보 브리핑 (날씨, 주식)","variant":"body"}]}}]'"},"metadata":{"thoughtSignature":"EiYKJGUyNDgzMGE3LTVjZDYtNDJmZS05OThiLWVlNTM5ZTcyYjljMw=="}}]

[{"type":"text","text":"**현재 상태**

지금은 유튜브 앱에서 **'핑크퐁 아기상어 체조'** 영상을 시청 중입니다. 방금 영상의 30초 앞으로 이동하는 조작을 도와드렸습니다.

**현재 상태 기반으로 할 수 있는 일**

- **유튜브 영상 조작**: 일시정지, 건너뛰기, 볼륨 조절 등 재생 제어
- **콘텐츠 정보 확인**: 지금 나오는 노래나 캐릭터에 대해 물어보기
- **연관 콘텐츠 검색**: 다른 핑크퐁 영상이나 비슷한 인기 동요 찾기

예시: `영상 멈춰줘`, `아기상어 가사 알려줘`, `다른 핑크퐁 노래 찾아줘`

**일반적으로 할 수 있는 일**

- **미디어 검색 및 재생**: 영화, 방송, YouTube, TV Plus 채널 검색/재생
- **정보 브리핑**: 날씨, 뉴스, 주식 정보를 TV 카드로 확인
- **TV 제어**: 앱 실행, 메뉴 이동, 리모컨 키 조작 등

예시: `뉴스 요약해줘`, `오늘 브리핑 TV에 보여줘`, `유튜브 열어줘`

TV 화면에 현재 상태에 맞춘 도움말 메뉴를 띄워 드렸으니 참고해 보세요! 😊"}]
